items.caption: In a laundromat, a man and a boy are engaged in the task of sorting laundry. The man, wearing a black baseball cap, is holding a pile of clothes, while the boy, in a white t-shirt, is opening a washing machine. The washing machines are prominently displayed in the background, with one of them showing a "Dexter" logo. The laundromat has a clean and organized appearance, with a clock on the wall indicating the time. The overall atmosphere suggests a day of community service, as indicated by the text.
